title: Door Lock Error
shortDescription: The washer door lock mechanism has failed to engage.
fullDescription: The E1 error code on Xiaomi washers indicates the door lock assembly cannot secure the door within the expected time. The control board sends a lock signal, and if confirmation is not received, E1 is triggered and the cycle will not start.

causes.cause: Foreign object in door seal preventing closure
Wiring fault between lock and control board

symptoms: Washer will not start and displays E1
Door appears closed but lock indicator is off
Clicking sound from door area without engaging
Door remains locked after power off
Intermittent E1 that clears after reopening door

fixSteps.title: Check for obstructions
fixSteps.instruction: Open the door and inspect the seal and latch area for clothing or debris preventing full closure.

fixSteps.title: Verify door alignment
fixSteps.instruction: Close the door slowly and observe latch engagement. If misaligned, tighten hinge screws.

fixSteps.title: Test the door lock
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug the washer. Access the door lock behind the front panel. Test continuity with a multimeter.

fixSteps.title: Replace door lock
fixSteps.instruction: Remove old lock assembly and install replacement. Reconnect wiring and test.

whenToCallPro: If the control board is suspected or you are not comfortable removing panels.
videoSearchQuery: Xiaomi washer E1 error door lock fix

faq.q: How do I unlock the door with E1?
faq.a: Unplug for 3 minutes. If still locked, use the emergency release tab behind the drain filter access.

faq.q: Can a power surge cause E1?
faq.a: Yes. A power reset may resolve temporary glitches.

faq.q: Is the Xiaomi door lock the same as other Chinese brands?
faq.a: No. Always use the specific part number for your Xiaomi model.

title: Drain Error
shortDescription: The washer cannot drain water within the allowed time.
fullDescription: The E2 error code indicates the washer failed to drain water within approximately 8 minutes. Common causes include a clogged drain filter, blocked hose, or failed drain pump.
symptoms: Standing water in drum after cycle

fixSteps.title: Clean drain filter
fixSteps.instruction: Open the filter access panel at the bottom. Place towels and a pan below. Unscrew the filter and clean thoroughly.

fixSteps.title: Check drain hose
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect for kinks and blockages. Ensure not inserted too far into standpipe.

fixSteps.title: Inspect pump impeller
fixSteps.instruction: With filter out, use a flashlight to check for objects blocking the impeller.

fixSteps.title: Test drain pump
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug and test pump motor resistance (5-20 ohms normal).

whenToCallPro: If the drain pump motor has failed.
videoSearchQuery: Xiaomi washer E2 error drain fix

faq.q: How do I drain water manually?
faq.a: Use the drain filter at the bottom. Place towels and slowly open the filter.

faq.q: Can too much detergent cause E2?
faq.a: Yes. Excess suds impede drainage. Use HE detergent.

faq.q: How often should I clean the drain filter?
faq.a: Monthly, or more often with heavily soiled loads.

title: Water Fill Timeout
shortDescription: The washer did not fill with water in the expected time.
fullDescription: The E3 error code means the machine did not detect the required water level within approximately 10 minutes. Causes include closed supply valves, clogged inlet screens, or a faulty inlet valve.
symptoms: Only hot or cold water enters

fixSteps.title: Check supply valves
fixSteps.instruction: Ensure both hot and cold valves are fully open.

fixSteps.title: Clean inlet screens
fixSteps.instruction: Disconnect hoses and clean the mesh filter screens.

fixSteps.title: Check hoses
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect for kinks. Replace damaged hoses.

fixSteps.title: Test inlet valve
fixSteps.instruction: Test solenoid resistance (500-1500 ohms normal).

whenToCallPro: If the inlet valve is faulty.
videoSearchQuery: Xiaomi washer E3 error water fill fix

faq.q: Can I reset E3?
faq.a: Unplug for 1 minute and replug. Error clears if the issue is resolved.

faq.q: What pressure does the washer need?
faq.a: Minimum 20 PSI is typically required.

faq.q: Why does E3 happen only on hot cycles?
faq.a: The hot water inlet may be clogged while the cold works fine.

title: Water Overflow Error
shortDescription: Water level has exceeded the safe maximum.
fullDescription: The E4 error code indicates the water level has risen above the safe threshold. A stuck-open inlet valve or faulty pressure sensor is typically responsible.

fixSteps.title: Shut off water supply
fixSteps.instruction: Immediately turn off water supply valves.

fixSteps.title: Check pressure switch hose
fixSteps.instruction: Remove top panel. Verify the hose is connected and not kinked.

fixSteps.title: Test pressure switch
fixSteps.instruction: Blow into the switch port and listen for a click.

fixSteps.title: Check inlet valve
fixSteps.instruction: With washer unplugged, check if water drips through. Replace if stuck.

whenToCallPro: If the inlet valve is stuck open, which is a flooding risk.
videoSearchQuery: Xiaomi washer E4 error overflow fix

faq.q: Is E4 a flood risk?
faq.a: Yes. Turn off water immediately and do not use the washer until repaired.

faq.q: Can a clogged pressure hose cause E4?
faq.a: Yes. The board cannot detect water level without feedback.

faq.q: Should I replace valve or sensor first?
faq.a: Check if water flows through an unplugged valve first. If yes, replace the valve.

title: Motor Drive Error
shortDescription: The motor is not running at the expected speed.
fullDescription: The E5 error code indicates the motor controller detects a fault in the drive motor operation. The motor may fail to start, stall, or run at incorrect speeds.

fixSteps.title: Reduce load
fixSteps.instruction: Remove items to reduce load size. Redistribute remaining items evenly.

fixSteps.title: Check for jammed objects
fixSteps.instruction: Rotate drum by hand. Listen for scraping sounds.

fixSteps.title: Inspect motor brushes
fixSteps.instruction: Access motor. Remove brush holders. Replace if shorter than 1 cm.

fixSteps.title: Test motor
fixSteps.instruction: Disconnect motor wiring. Test windings and hall sensor with multimeter.

whenToCallPro: If motor or inverter replacement is needed.
videoSearchQuery: Xiaomi washer E5 error motor fix

faq.q: Can overloading damage the motor?
faq.a: Yes. Follow the weight limits in your manual.

faq.q: Is a burning smell dangerous?
faq.a: Yes. Unplug immediately and inspect before further use.

faq.q: Does Xiaomi use inverter motors?
faq.a: Many newer Xiaomi washers use BLDC inverter motors which do not have carbon brushes.

title: Heating Error
shortDescription: The water heater has not reached the target temperature.
fullDescription: The E6 error code indicates the heater element failed to heat water to the target within the expected time.

fixSteps.title: Test heating element
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug. Access heater. Test resistance (20-40 ohms normal). Test for ground fault.

fixSteps.title: Test NTC sensor
fixSteps.instruction: Disconnect and test resistance (20K-50K ohms at room temp).

fixSteps.title: Check wiring
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect all connections. Reseat connectors.

fixSteps.title: Replace faulty component
fixSteps.instruction: Replace heater or sensor. Ensure seal is seated properly.

whenToCallPro: If not comfortable with electrical components near water.
videoSearchQuery: Xiaomi washer E6 error heater fix

faq.q: Can I use cold wash only?
faq.a: Cold cycles may work but the heater should be repaired.

faq.q: Is a ground fault dangerous?
faq.a: Yes. It can trip breakers and pose shock risk. Replace immediately.

faq.q: How long should heating take?
faq.a: 15-30 minutes depending on target temperature.

title: Motor Speed Sensor Error
shortDescription: The motor speed sensor is not returning correct signals.
fullDescription: The E7 error code indicates the control board cannot read motor speed accurately. The hall sensor on the motor is malfunctioning.

causes.cause: Loose wiring between motor and board

fixSteps.title: Power reset
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug for 2 minutes and restart.

fixSteps.title: Check motor wiring
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect and reseat all connectors between motor and board.

fixSteps.title: Test hall sensor
fixSteps.instruction: Disconnect and test resistance per service manual.

fixSteps.title: Inspect motor rotor
fixSteps.instruction: Remove rotor. Check magnets for cracks or displacement.

videoSearchQuery: Xiaomi washer E7 error motor speed sensor fix

faq.q: Is the hall sensor replaceable separately?
faq.a: Usually yes. It is a small sensor on the motor stator.

faq.q: Can overloading cause E7?
faq.a: A severely overloaded drum can stall the motor, causing erratic readings.

faq.q: Do I need the full motor?
faq.a: Not usually. Replace the hall sensor first.

title: Water Level Sensor Fault
shortDescription: The water level pressure sensor is returning abnormal readings.
fullDescription: The E8 error code means the water level sensor is stuck or reading outside expected range, preventing proper fill management.

fixSteps.title: Check pressure hose
fixSteps.instruction: Remove top panel. Verify rubber hose is connected and not kinked.

fixSteps.title: Clear blockages
fixSteps.instruction: Blow through the hose. Check the air dome fitting.

fixSteps.title: Test sensor
fixSteps.instruction: Blow into sensor port and listen for click. Test with multimeter.

fixSteps.title: Replace sensor
fixSteps.instruction: Remove old sensor, install replacement, reconnect.

whenToCallPro: If sensor and hose are fine but E8 persists.
videoSearchQuery: Xiaomi washer E8 error water level sensor fix

faq.q: Can a blocked hose cause overflow?
faq.a: Yes. Without water level feedback, the washer may overfill.

faq.q: Is the sensor expensive?
faq.a: No. Typically $8 to $22.

faq.q: How do I know if the hose is blocked?
faq.a: Blow through it gently. No resistance means it is clear.

title: Unbalanced Load Error
shortDescription: The auto-balance routine has exhausted all attempts.
fullDescription: The UE error code indicates the washer tried multiple redistribution cycles and cannot balance the load for spin.

causes.cause: Load too small or large for balance

fixSteps.title: Redistribute load
fixSteps.instruction: Open door. Untangle and spread items evenly. Aim for one-third to three-quarters full.

fixSteps.title: Add balancing items
fixSteps.instruction: For single heavy items, add 2-3 towels of similar weight.

fixSteps.title: Level the washer
fixSteps.instruction: Use a bubble level. Adjust leveling feet.

fixSteps.title: Inspect suspension
fixSteps.instruction: If UE is frequent, check shock absorbers. Push drum down and release; should settle quickly.

whenToCallPro: If UE occurs frequently with all load sizes.
videoSearchQuery: Xiaomi washer UE error unbalanced fix

faq.q: Can a single blanket cause UE?
faq.a: Yes. Add towels to balance.

faq.q: Does a rubber mat help?
faq.a: Yes. Anti-vibration pads can reduce movement.

faq.q: Can soft flooring cause UE?
faq.a: Yes. Place the washer on a solid, level surface.

title: NTC Temperature Sensor Fault
shortDescription: The temperature sensor is reading an abnormal value.
fullDescription: The F1 error code indicates the NTC temperature sensor is returning a value outside the expected range. The sensor may be open-circuit, short-circuit, or reading impossible temperatures.
symptoms: Washer heats excessively or not at all
Cold wash works but hot triggers F1

fixSteps.title: Reset washer
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug for 2 minutes and plug back in.

fixSteps.title: Test NTC sensor
fixSteps.instruction: Access and disconnect sensor. Test resistance (20K-50K ohms at room temp).

fixSteps.title: Check wiring
fixSteps.instruction: Trace wiring to control board. Look for loose connections.

fixSteps.title: Replace sensor
fixSteps.instruction: Pull out old sensor. Insert new one fully into heater housing.

whenToCallPro: If the sensor tests fine but F1 persists.
videoSearchQuery: Xiaomi washer F1 error temperature sensor fix

faq.q: Can cold wash cycles work with F1?
faq.a: Some models allow cold cycles since the heater is not needed.

faq.q: Are NTC sensors expensive?
faq.a: No. Typically $5 to $14.

faq.q: Can extreme cold trigger F1?
faq.a: In very cold environments, the initial reading may be out of range. Keep the washer above 5 degrees Celsius.
